narrative:
Jefferson Township has 4,070 registered voters, with 53.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 33.7%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 20.5 percentage points.
